summary: Frontend-only test of Document Sharing Framework Phase 1 (driver-bundle path) completed. All required UI behavior validated end-to-end on /distributor/delivery-schedules/e2ec4623-7f5e-4020-91a7-8b0ae9f3b9a1: Share button appears, dialog opens with correct title 'Delivery Bundle - 2026-05-18', subject prefilled, Email channel active + WhatsApp shown as disabled (soon), 0 recipient chips (distributor email empty as expected), Attach-PDF toggle ON by default. Email validation rejects both empty and invalid values with an error toast and keeps the dialog open. A real send to delivered@resend.dev closed the dialog (success path). Stock Transfers page loaded without errors and showed 0 Share buttons (no synced Zoho rows in preview - expected). Delivery-invoice share path was not testable in preview (no delivery with a Zoho invoice URL accessible to the test user).

design_issues.screen: Schedule Detail page (with Share button rendered)
issues: React hydration warning in console: '<button> cannot contain a nested <button>'. Not blocking; appears while DashboardLayout/ProtectedRoute renders the schedule detail.

action_items: Optional cleanup: resolve the nested-button React hydration warning surfaced on the schedule detail page.

Update /app/memory/test_credentials.md: schedule e2ec4623-7f5e-4020-91a7-8b0ae9f3b9a1 belongs to distributor b8876367-df64-4c55-a382-d5eb3b4b2380. Correct test user is surya@gmail.com / nyladist## (role Distributor, name Trs11). The admin surya.yadavalli@nylaairwater.earth gets 403 from /api/distributor/delivery-schedules/* because _resolve_distributor_id requires distributor_id on the user. john.distributor@test.com (Brian) returns 404 (different distributor).

If full coverage of Phase 1 is desired, seed one synced stock-transfer (Zoho status=synced, zoho_invoice_id present) and one delivered delivery with zoho_invoice_url visible to a reachable test user. In the current preview, neither stock_transfer_doc nor delivery_invoice Share buttons could be exercised.
critical_code_review_comments: ShareButton.jsx success path: dialog auto-closes on resolve and a sonner success toast is shown using data.message || 'Document shared'.
Email validation regex /^\S+@\S+\.\S+$/ is intentionally lenient client-side; backend should re-validate.
WhatsApp channel is rendered as a non-interactive div with cursor-not-allowed and a '(soon)' label - correctly deferred for Phase 2.
ShareDialog uses Bearer token from localStorage via HEAD() while the rest of the app relies on the global axios.defaults.withCredentials + interceptor; consistent and works.

success_rate.frontend: Driver bundle path: 11/11 checks pass. Stock-transfer & delivery-invoice paths: page-load only, no records to exercise Share in preview.

test_credentials: Distributor user that OWNS test schedule e2ec4623-7f5e-4020-91a7-8b0ae9f3b9a1: email=surya@gmail.com, password=nyladist##, tenant=nyla-air-water, distributor_id=multi-crm-test. Recipient sink: delivered@resend.dev.
seed_data_creation: None. One real share send was made via Resend to delivered@resend.dev (designated no-op sink).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Login as surya@gmail.com / nyladist## to test schedule e2ec4623... Admin gets 403, Brian/john gets 404 - by design (_resolve_distributor_id). Key data-testids on ShareDialog: share-btn-schedule-<id>, share-dialog-schedule-<id>, share-channel-email, share-channel-whatsapp, share-recipient-chip-<i>, share-name-input, share-email-input, share-subject-input, share-message-input, share-attach-toggle, share-cancel-btn, share-send-btn. Validation toast text: 'Enter a valid email address'. Success is confirmed by the dialog detaching (use page.wait_for_selector(state='detached')).
rca of the issue: n/a - no defects found in Phase 1 sharing flow.
